title: Ubiquiti G6 Turret - UniFi Protect camera, 8MP, black
category: Ubiquiti / Cameras, security / IP cameras / Turret
description: The UniFi G6 Turret camera features a high-resolution 8MP sensor (3840 x 2160 @ 30 FPS) and a fixed lens with a 109.9° field of view. It is equipped with infrared LEDs for night vision up to 30 meters, as well as a built-in microphone for audio recording. The device includes a 10/100 Mbps LAN port with PoE support and is housed in a weather-resistant IP66-rated enclosure, making it ideal for outdoor use The camera is powered exclusively via a PoE adapter or a switch that supports the 802.3af standard and passive PoE (36â57V DC). Its maximum power consumption is 12.5W With integrated AI capabilities, the camera supports advanced detection features such as facial recognition, license plate detection, and smart object classification (person, vehicle, animal) 8MP video at 30 FPS AI-powered smart detections Infrared night vision (up to 30 m) IP66 weather-resistant housing Built-in microphone Managed via UniFi Protect software Vandal-resistant rating: IK04 Camera unit Screws and wall plugs Wall mounting bracket
